name: forgeplan-map-pack
description: 8-agent orchestrated pipeline that scans any forgeplan-enabled project and emits a validated .forgeplan/map/map.json (schema forgeplan.map/v1) for forgeplan-web's composed-map renderer. EMITTER profile throughout: a fail-closed PreToolUse hook + agent denylist + a deterministic map-guardian.mjs gate make it structurally impossible for the pipeline to write anywhere except the one derived, gitignored map file or to mutate any forgeplan artifact. v0.2.0: full P1 implementation shipped -- all 8 agents, 3 skills, 3 MVP composition templates, the map-build playbook, and the guardian/hook pair (unit-verified against a vendored forgeplan-web fixture + 8 synthetic mutations + 10 synthetic hook payloads). Pre-1.0: not yet dogfooded end-to-end against a real repo.

cli.name: forgeplan
cli.reason: Requires the playbook runtime for map-build.yaml and read-only forgeplan_graph/list/get MCP surfaces used by forgeplan-scanner (same precedent as forgeplan-brownfield-pack).
